confirm_remove_device: Are you sure you want to remove this device?
mixed_content_explanation: Your browser is blocking requests to insecure origins. Please enable mixed content to allow the app to communicate with your WLED devices.
about_kolori_description: A modern, intuitive web interface for controlling WLED devices with style and ease.
open_source_notice: This is an open-source project. Contributions are welcome!
no_devices_found_explanation: Make sure your WLED devices are powered on and connected to the same network.
scan_failed_explanation: There was an error while scanning for devices. Please try again.
invalid_ip: Please enter a valid IP address (e.g., 192.168.1.100)
invalid_mdns: Please enter a valid mDNS name (letters, numbers, hyphens, dots allowed)
mdns_alternative: Alternative to IP address. Examples: wled-device, device.local, subdomain.domain.local
connection_options_explanation: Provide either an IP address OR mDNS name (or both). The app will automatically test which one works and use the most reliable option.
protocol_explanation: Most WLED devices use HTTP. Use HTTPS only if your device supports SSL.
device_offline: {deviceName} is currently offline. Preset controls are disabled until the connection is restored.
change_device_prompt: Change to a different device or add a new one.
device_offline_notification_message: {deviceName} is disconnected. Please check your device connection.
empty_playlist_message: Add some custom effects to your playlist before saving.
device_offline_playlist_message: Connect to a WLED device before saving playlists.
invalid_playlist_message: All playlist items must be saved custom effects with preset IDs.
playlist_saved_message: @@playlistName@@ has been saved to your WLED device via WebSocket.
save_failed_message: Could not save playlist via WebSocket: {errorMessage}
remove_device_message: Are you sure you want to remove @@deviceName@@? This will permanently delete the device from your list and cannot be undone.
presets_imported_message: Successfully imported {totalItems} {itemType} from your WLED device.
device_validation_error_unexpected: Unexpected error occurred during device validation
device_name_and_connection_required: Please provide a device name and at least an IP address or mDNS name.
device_name_exists: Device name @@deviceName@@ already exists. Please choose a different name.
ip_in_use: IP address {ip} is already in use by device @@deviceName@@.
mdns_in_use: mDNS name {mdns} is already in use by device @@deviceName@@.
device_confirmed: WLED device confirmed via {bestAddress}! Adding to devices...
user_agreement_alert: You must accept the terms to use Kolori. The page will now close.
partial_deletion_message: @@playlistName@@ removed locally but may still exist on WLED device.
deletion_error_message: Error removing @@playlistName@@ from device, but removed locally.
connect_to_delete_playlist: Connect to a WLED device to delete playlists from the device.
playlist_deleted_message: @@playlistName@@ has been removed from your WLED device.
fetch_presets_error: Connect to a WLED device to fetch presets.
mixed_content_protection_subtitle: Ensuring secure communication with your WLED devices
mixed_content_protection_active_explanat: This app runs in a special protected iframe that allows secure communication with HTTP WLED devices even when served over HTTPS.
enhanced_security_explanation: Your connection to this website remains secure while allowing local device communication through controlled permissions.
direct_communication_explanation: Since this app is served over HTTP, it can communicate directly with your WLED devices without any restrictions.
full_access_to_wled: Full access to control your WLED devices
real_time_control: Real-time preset activation and effect control
local_network_acknowledgement: By continuing, you acknowledge that this app will communicate with devices on your local network.
